summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of CiviCast MVP. All backend APIs and frontend features are working correctly. Tested campaign creation, voting system, community reports (with and without images), progress panel, and navigation.
passed_tests: Backend: Root API endpoint responding correctly
Backend: Campaign creation with all required fields
Backend: Campaign listing retrieval
Backend: Single campaign retrieval by ID
Backend: Vote submission for all three types (confident, notSure, notConfident)
Backend: Vote statistics calculation and retrieval
Backend: Community report creation (text only)
Backend: Community reports retrieval
Backend: Progress updates retrieval
Frontend: Homepage loads with correct header and branding
Frontend: Create Campaign button accessible
Frontend: Create Campaign modal opens and closes
Frontend: Campaign creation form accepts all inputs
Frontend: Campaign creation submits successfully
Frontend: Created campaign appears on homepage
Frontend: Campaign card navigation to detail page
Frontend: Campaign detail page displays all information
Frontend: Voting section displays with three options
Frontend: Vote submission works (tested confident vote)
Frontend: Vote confirmation message displays
Frontend: Vote percentages calculate and display correctly
Frontend: Progress panel toggle button works
Frontend: Progress panel opens with smooth animation
Frontend: Community report form displays in progress panel
Frontend: Community report submission (text only) works
Frontend: Community report submission with image upload works
Frontend: Image preview displays before submission
Frontend: Submitted reports appear in progress panel
Frontend: Report verification status badges display correctly
Frontend: Back button navigation returns to homepage
Frontend: Campaign persists on homepage after navigation
